steps.title: Identify the emphasis requirement
steps.content: To “emphasize” the number of gold medals Rafael Costa won, the choice must make that specific count stand out as the key focus.

steps.title: Evaluate the choices
steps.content:
Choice A — In his career as a Paralympic swimmer, Rafael Costa won thirty-eight total medals — twenty-five of them were gold. explicitly states both the total medal count (thirty-eight) and isolates the gold medal count (twenty-five) with an em dash to emphasize it as a key detail.

The other options fail to state the specific number of gold medals: one mentions him as a “multiple gold medalist” without the count, one does not name him at all, and one states the total without the gold breakdown.

By directly stating and highlighting the gold medal number as a separate detail, the correct answer creates the emphasis the question asks for.

That matches Choice A — In his career as a Paralympic swimmer, Rafael Costa won thirty-eight total medals — twenty-five of them were gold..
